title: Light Craft
description: A light weight modpack that mostly sticks to vanilla and provides a refreshing experience.
body: This is a modpack that sticks to vanilla while refreshing your gameplay. This modpack adds NO new biomes but many more features. At the core of this modpack there is 4 mods. Geophillic, Ecospherical Expansion, Dynamic Surroundings, and Alex's Mobs. In the images you can see example of how the modpack looks like. In my opinion this is a fun mod with dynamic environments, shooting baby villagers, and cooking some new foods!
